name: Weaver Cow
appearance: Soft, velvet-like white fur, bulbous, hairy abdomen, short, thick legs
silk_production: Milked by rancher, gentle stimulation of spinnerets
silk_properties: Thick, high-tensile, braided stronger than steel cable, lighter
temperament: Aggressively docile, likes to be scratched behind pedipalps
danger: Getting stuck in webbing without solvent-spray
